title: Luffy Keeps Coming Back
description: On pages 17–19, luffy keeps coming back focuses on Luffy, Arlong, Nami, Cocoyashi villagers as arlong unleashes his brutal speed and teeth-based attacks as Luffy refuses to back down.
scene: On pages 17–19, luffy keeps coming back focuses on Luffy, Arlong, Nami, Cocoyashi villagers as arlong unleashes his brutal speed and teeth-based attacks as Luffy refuses to back down.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: For Nami, there is no better happiness than to stay here and continue drawing maps!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: For the sake of my ambition, that is!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Once we fishmen learn everything there is to know about the seas from her maps, we shall be invincible!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: The world shall then become my empire!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: And this island, or east blue in essence,

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: shall be my stepping stone for that!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Do you think you can use her more effectively than I?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Move Kiribachi even a single inch...!~

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
